item.title: Microneedling
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Microneedling is a skin-rejuvenation treatment that improves texture, tone, and overall appearance by stimulating your body’s natural collagen production. It’s a simple, effective way to refresh the skin and achieve a smoother, more even look.

Clients choose microneedling for its ability to deliver noticeable results without aggressive downtime. At Livia Med Spa, every treatment is customized to your skin type and goals, ensuring natural-looking improvement with precision and care.

What Is Microneedling

Microneedling is a minimally invasive treatment that uses a device with ultra-fine needles to create controlled micro-injuries in the skin. These tiny channels trigger your body’s natural healing response, stimulating collagen and elastin production.

As your skin repairs itself, it becomes firmer, smoother, and more even in tone. This process helps improve overall skin quality rather than just treating the surface.

The treatment is highly customizable. Depth, intensity, and technique are adjusted based on your skin concerns—whether that’s acne scars, fine lines, or uneven texture. It can also be combined with serums or PRP to enhance results.

Because the treatment works with your body’s natural processes, results develop gradually and look natural. When performed by trained professionals, microneedling is safe, controlled, and effective for a wide range of skin types.

What Does Microneedling Treat

Microneedling helps improve a variety of common skin concerns.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Acne scars
  • Uneven skin texture
  • Large pores
  • Hyperpigmentation
  • Dull or tired-looking skin

Aftercare

After treatment, your skin may appear red and feel similar to a mild sunburn for the first 24–48 hours. Most clients experience minimal downtime and quick recovery.

  • Avoid sun exposure and wear SPF
  • Keep skin clean and hydrated
  • Avoid makeup for 24 hours
  • Do not use harsh skincare products for a few days
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

You may start noticing improvements within a few weeks, with continued results as collagen builds over time. A series of treatments is often recommended, and results can last several months with proper maintenance.

How Much Does Microneedling Cost

Pricing depends on the treatment area, number of sessions, and whether add-ons like PRP are included. Because treatments are customized, costs can vary.

A consultation is the best way to determine exact pricing and create a plan tailored to your skin goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Stimulate your skin's natural collagen production to improve texture, tone, and firmness with precision microneedling.

item.title: Secret RF Microneedling
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Secret RF Microneedling combines traditional microneedling with radiofrequency energy to tighten, smooth, and rejuvenate the skin at a deeper level. It’s an advanced treatment designed to improve both skin texture and firmness in a natural-looking way.

Clients choose this treatment for its ability to deliver more noticeable tightening and contouring compared to standard microneedling. At Livia Med Spa, each treatment is fully customized, focusing on precision, skin quality, and results that look refined—not overdone.

What Is Secret RF Microneedling

Secret RF Microneedling is an advanced skin treatment that uses ultra-fine needles combined with radiofrequency (RF) energy to stimulate collagen deep within the skin. As the needles create controlled micro-channels, RF energy is delivered beneath the surface to enhance tightening and remodeling.

This dual approach allows the treatment to target both the surface and deeper layers of the skin. While microneedling improves texture and tone, the added RF energy helps tighten loose skin and improve overall firmness.

The treatment is highly customizable. Depth, intensity, and energy levels are adjusted based on your skin type and concerns, allowing for a tailored approach whether you're targeting fine lines, acne scars, or mild skin laxity.

Because the treatment stimulates your body’s natural collagen production, results develop gradually and appear natural. When performed by trained professionals, it is a safe and effective option for long-term skin improvement.

What Does Secret RF Microneedling Treat

This treatment addresses both texture and skin tightening concerns.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Skin laxity (loose or sagging skin)
  • Acne scars
  • Uneven texture
  • Large pores
  • Stretch marks

Aftercare

After treatment, you may experience redness, mild swelling, or sensitivity for a few days. Most clients can return to normal activities shortly after, with minimal downtime.

  • Avoid direct sun exposure and wear SPF
  • Keep skin clean and well-hydrated
  • Avoid makeup for 24 hours
  • Do not use active skincare (retinol, acids) for several days
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Initial improvements may be seen within a few weeks, with continued tightening and smoothing over time as collagen rebuilds. Results can last several months and improve with a series of treatments.

How Much Does Secret RF Microneedling Cost

Pricing varies depending on the treatment area, number of sessions, and level of customization needed. Each plan is tailored to your goals, so costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine exact pricing and build a treatment plan specific to your skin.
item.excerpt:encoded: Combine radiofrequency energy with microneedling for deeper skin tightening and dramatic rejuvenation results.

item.title: Glo2Facial
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Glo2Facial is an advanced facial treatment that exfoliates, oxygenates, and nourishes the skin for an instant glow. It’s designed to refresh dull skin, improve texture, and leave you looking brighter and more radiant after just one session.

Clients love Glo2Facial for its immediate results with no downtime. At Livia Med Spa, each treatment is customized to your skin type and concerns, ensuring a targeted approach that delivers clean, natural-looking results.

What Is Glo2Facial

Glo2Facial is a multi-step treatment that works from the inside out to improve overall skin health. It combines exfoliation, oxygenation, and infusion to refresh and revitalize the skin in a single session.

The treatment begins with gentle exfoliation to remove dead skin cells and prepare the skin. Then, a specialized process creates a natural oxygenation effect within the skin, helping to boost circulation and enhance absorption of nutrients.

Finally, customized serums are infused into the skin based on your specific concerns—whether that’s hydration, brightening, or anti-aging. This allows the treatment to be tailored to each individual, making it effective for a wide range of skin types.

Because the treatment works with your skin’s natural processes, results appear instantly refreshed and continue to improve over time. It’s a comfortable, non-invasive option that requires no downtime and fits easily into any routine.

What Does Glo2Facial Treat

Glo2Facial is ideal for improving overall skin appearance and maintaining healthy skin.

  • Dull or tired-looking skin
  • Uneven skin tone
  • Dry or dehydrated skin
  • Fine lines
  • Congested pores
  • Lack of radiance

Aftercare

There is no downtime after a Glo2Facial, and most clients leave with an immediate glow. Skin may feel refreshed and hydrated right away.

  • Avoid heavy makeup for the rest of the day if possible
  • Stay hydrated to maintain results
  • Use gentle skincare products
  • Apply SPF daily
  • Follow any personalized recommendations

Results are visible immediately, with smoother, brighter skin after just one session. With regular treatments, results can be maintained and improved over time.

How Much Does Glo2Facial Cost

Pricing depends on the type of facial, add-ons, and level of customization. Because treatments are tailored, costs may vary.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right option for your skin and get exact pricing.
item.excerpt:encoded: A next-generation facial that combines exfoliation, oxygenation, and infusion for an instant, healthy glow.

item.title: Helix CO2 Laser
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Helix CO2 Laser is an advanced skin resurfacing treatment that improves texture, tone, and overall skin quality. It’s designed to reduce signs of aging, smooth imperfections, and reveal healthier, more refined skin.

Clients choose this treatment for its ability to deliver powerful results while still being customizable. At Livia Med Spa, every Helix treatment is tailored to your skin and goals, using precise settings to achieve natural-looking results with expert care.

What Is Helix CO2 Laser

Helix CO2 Laser is a fractional laser treatment that works by creating controlled micro-injuries in the skin using targeted light energy. This process stimulates your body’s natural healing response, boosting collagen production and encouraging new, healthier skin to form.

What makes the Helix system unique is its ability to combine different modes of treatment, allowing for both surface-level resurfacing and deeper collagen stimulation. This means it can be adjusted for anything from light refresh treatments to more intensive skin correction.

As the skin heals, it becomes smoother, tighter, and more even in tone. The treatment helps improve overall skin quality rather than just temporarily masking concerns.

Each treatment is fully customized based on your skin type, concerns, and downtime preferences. When performed by trained professionals, Helix CO2 Laser is a safe and effective way to achieve long-term skin improvement with natural results.

What Does Helix CO2 Laser Treat

This treatment targets a wide range of skin concerns for both texture and tone.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Sun damage
  • Uneven skin tone
  • Acne scars
  • Skin laxity
  • Rough or uneven texture

Aftercare

Downtime can vary depending on the intensity of the treatment. You may experience redness, peeling, or sensitivity as your skin heals.

  • Avoid direct sun exposure and wear SPF daily
  • Keep skin clean and well-moisturized
  • Do not pick or peel the skin
  • Avoid makeup until skin is healed (as advised)
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Initial results can be seen once the skin begins to heal, with continued improvement over the following weeks as collagen rebuilds. Results can last long-term with proper skincare and maintenance.

How Much Does Helix CO2 Laser Cost

Pricing varies depending on the treatment intensity, area treated, and number of sessions needed. Because treatments are fully customized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right approach and exact pricing for your goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Fractional CO2 laser resurfacing to dramatically reduce scars, wrinkles, and sun damage with precision technology.

item.title: Sclerotherapy
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Sclerotherapy is a proven treatment designed to reduce the appearance of spider veins and small varicose veins. It helps restore smoother, clearer-looking skin by targeting unwanted veins directly at the source.

Clients choose sclerotherapy for its effectiveness and minimal downtime. At Livia Med Spa, each treatment is carefully customized to your specific vein patterns, ensuring precise, natural-looking results with a focus on comfort and safety.

What Is Sclerotherapy

Sclerotherapy is a non-surgical treatment that involves injecting a specialized solution directly into unwanted veins. This solution causes the vein to collapse and gradually be absorbed by the body over time.

Once treated, the vein fades from view as blood is naturally redirected to healthier veins. The result is smoother, more even-looking skin without the need for invasive procedures.

The treatment is quick and performed with fine needles for precision. Multiple veins can be treated in one session, and additional sessions may be recommended depending on the extent of the concern.

Each treatment is tailored to your individual needs, as vein size, location, and severity can vary. When performed by trained professionals, sclerotherapy is a safe and highly effective option for improving the appearance of visible veins.

What Does Sclerotherapy Treat

This treatment is focused on improving the appearance of visible veins.

  • Spider veins
  • Small varicose veins
  • Leg vein discoloration
  • Visible surface veins
  • Uneven skin appearance caused by veins

Aftercare

After treatment, you can typically return to normal activities the same day. Mild swelling, redness, or bruising may occur in the treated areas.

  • Wear compression stockings if recommended
  • Avoid strenuous exercise for a short period
  • Stay active with light walking to promote circulation
  • Avoid prolonged sun exposure
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Veins will gradually fade over several weeks as the body absorbs them. Multiple sessions may be needed for optimal results, which can be long-lasting with proper care.

How Much Does Sclerotherapy Cost

Pricing depends on the number of veins treated and the number of sessions needed. Because each case is different, costs can vary.

A consultation is the best way to assess your concerns and determine exact pricing based on your treatment plan.
item.excerpt:encoded: Eliminate spider veins and varicose veins with this safe, proven injection-based treatment.

item.title: Weight Loss
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Medical weight loss is a personalized approach to help you lose weight safely and effectively with professional guidance. It focuses on improving metabolism, controlling appetite, and supporting long-term results—not quick fixes.

Clients choose this treatment for structured support and real, sustainable progress. At Livia Med Spa, every plan is customized to your body, goals, and lifestyle to ensure results that feel natural and maintainable.

What Is Weight Loss

Medical weight loss is a customized program designed to help you lose weight in a controlled, healthy way. It may include prescription medications, lifestyle guidance, and ongoing monitoring to support consistent progress.

These treatments work by helping regulate appetite, improve how your body processes food, and support better energy balance. Unlike fad diets, the focus is on creating steady, realistic changes that lead to long-term success.

Each plan is tailored to you. Factors like your current weight, goals, metabolism, and medical history are all considered when building your program.

Because this approach is supervised by professionals, it allows for adjustments along the way to keep you progressing safely and effectively. The goal is not just weight loss, but maintaining those results over time.

What Does Weight Loss Treat

This program is designed to support both physical and lifestyle-related concerns.

  • Excess body weight
  • Slow metabolism
  • Difficulty losing weight
  • Appetite control challenges
  • Weight fluctuations
  • Low energy related to weight

Aftercare

There is no downtime, but consistency is key to success. Ongoing support and follow-up are an important part of the process.

  • Follow your personalized plan closely
  • Stay consistent with medications (if prescribed)
  • Maintain a balanced diet
  • Stay active with regular movement
  • Attend follow-up appointments

Results vary, but many clients begin seeing progress within the first few weeks. With consistency, results can be maintained long-term as part of a sustainable lifestyle.

How Much Does Weight Loss Cost

Pricing varies depending on the type of program, medications used, and level of support needed. Because plans are customized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right approach and exact pricing for your goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Medically supervised weight loss programs tailored to your goals with proven treatments and ongoing support.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Medical-Grade Skincare
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Why Medical-Grade Matters

Not all skincare is created equal. While drugstore products can provide basic hydration and sun protection, medical-grade skincare is formulated with higher concentrations of active ingredients that penetrate deeper into the skin for visible, lasting results.

Key Differences

Medical-grade products, like those from ZO Skin Health (which we carry at Livia Med Spa), are backed by clinical research and contain pharmaceutical-grade ingredients. They're designed to target specific skin concerns at the cellular level — something over-the-counter products simply can't match.

Building Your Routine

A solid medical-grade skincare routine includes four essential steps:

  • Cleanser — Remove impurities without stripping your skin
  • Active Treatment — Target specific concerns (retinol, vitamin C, etc.)
  • Moisturizer — Lock in hydration and protect the skin barrier
  • Sunscreen — The single most important anti-aging product you can use

Our providers at Livia Med Spa can analyze your skin and recommend the exact products you need. No guesswork, no wasted money on products that don't work.
item.excerpt:encoded: Why medical-grade products outperform drugstore brands and how to build a results-driven skincare routine.

item.title: What to Expect at Your First Med Spa Visit
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Your First Visit, Demystified

If you've never been to a med spa before, it's completely normal to feel a mix of excitement and nervousness. At Livia Med Spa, we've designed every step of the experience to make you feel comfortable, informed, and cared for.

Step 1: The Consultation

Every journey starts with a free, no-pressure consultation. You'll meet with one of our expert providers to discuss your goals, concerns, and medical history. We'll examine your skin and recommend treatments that align with your budget and expectations.

Step 2: Your Treatment

On treatment day, you'll be welcomed into our luxury treatment suite. Depending on the procedure, the process can take anywhere from 15 minutes (for Botox) to 60 minutes (for a Glo2Facial or microneedling). Most treatments are minimally invasive with little to no downtime.

Step 3: Aftercare

We'll provide clear aftercare instructions and schedule any follow-up appointments. Our team is always available by phone or text if you have questions during your recovery.

Ready to take the first step? Book your complimentary consultation at Livia Med Spa today.
item.excerpt:encoded: A complete walkthrough of your consultation, treatment, and aftercare at Livia Med Spa — so you know exactly what to expect.

item.title: 5 Anti-Aging Treatments That Actually Work
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Evidence-Based Anti-Aging

The beauty industry is full of promises, but only a handful of treatments deliver scientifically proven results. Here are the five anti-aging treatments we recommend most at Livia Med Spa.

1. Botox & Neuromodulators

The gold standard for preventing and treating dynamic wrinkles. Regular treatments can actually slow the formation of new lines over time.

2. Microneedling with PRP

By creating micro-injuries in the skin and applying platelet-rich plasma, this treatment stimulates your body's natural collagen production for firmer, more youthful skin.

3. Chemical Peels

Medical-grade peels remove damaged outer layers to reveal fresh, even-toned skin underneath. They're excellent for hyperpigmentation, fine lines, and overall texture improvement.

4. Laser Skin Resurfacing

Our Helix CO2 laser delivers dramatic results for deep wrinkles, scars, and sun damage by stimulating new collagen growth at the deepest layers of skin.

5. Medical-Grade Retinol

Prescription-strength retinol is the most well-researched anti-aging ingredient in skincare. It accelerates cell turnover, boosts collagen, and fades discoloration.

Want a personalized anti-aging plan? Our experts will create a custom treatment roadmap during your free consultation.
item.excerpt:encoded: Cut through the noise — these are the five proven anti-aging treatments our providers recommend most.

item.title: The Benefits of IV Therapy for Skin Health
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Beauty From the Inside Out

While topical treatments and procedures work on the surface, true skin health starts from within. That's where IV therapy comes in — delivering essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants directly to your bloodstream for maximum absorption.

How IV Therapy Helps Your Skin

Our custom IV drips at Livia Med Spa are formulated with skin-boosting nutrients including:

  • Vitamin C — A powerful antioxidant that brightens skin and supports collagen production
  • Glutathione — The "master antioxidant" that detoxifies and promotes an even, luminous complexion
  • B-Complex Vitamins — Essential for cellular repair and energy production
  • Zinc — Supports skin healing and reduces inflammation

Beyond Skin Benefits

IV therapy also boosts energy, strengthens immunity, and helps with recovery after intense workouts or travel. Many of our clients schedule regular drips as part of their overall wellness routine.

Try it yourself. Book an IV therapy session at Livia Med Spa and feel the difference within hours.
item.excerpt:encoded: Discover how IV vitamin infusions can transform your skin from the inside out — boosting hydration, glow, and cellular repair.

item.title: Glo2Facial: Why Tampa's It-Girls Are Obsessed
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
The Facial That Changed Everything

If you've been on Instagram lately, you've probably seen the Glo2Facial everywhere. This innovative three-in-one treatment has taken Tampa by storm — and for good reason.

What Makes It Special?

Unlike traditional facials, the Glo2Facial uses a proprietary OxyPods technology that triggers a natural oxygenation process from within your skin. This means nutrients are absorbed more effectively, leading to better, longer-lasting results.

The Three-Step Process

  1. Exfoliate — Gentle resurfacing removes dead skin cells and prepares the skin
  2. Oxygenate — The OxyPods reaction floods skin with oxygen from within
  3. Infuse — Nutrient-rich serums are pushed deeper into the skin for maximum absorption

Why We Love It

The Glo2Facial delivers instant, visible results with absolutely zero downtime. You can literally get one on your lunch break and return to work glowing. It's safe for all skin types and can be customized for specific concerns like hydration, brightening, or anti-aging.

Want that Tampa glow? Book your Glo2Facial at Livia Med Spa — or host a Glo2Facial Party with your friends!
item.excerpt:encoded: The Glo2Facial is the hottest facial treatment in Tampa right now — here's why everyone is booking one.

item.title: Hair Restoration
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Hair restoration treatments are designed to support natural hair growth, improve thickness, and restore confidence without surgery. Using advanced options like PRP, this approach helps strengthen existing hair and stimulate new growth.

Clients choose this treatment for gradual, natural-looking improvement without invasive procedures. At Livia Med Spa, every plan is customized to your level of hair loss, goals, and scalp health to ensure balanced, realistic results.

What Is Hair Restoration

Hair restoration is a non-surgical treatment that focuses on stimulating hair follicles and improving scalp health to promote stronger, thicker hair growth. One of the most common methods used is platelet-rich plasma (PRP), which is derived from your own blood.

PRP contains growth factors that help activate dormant hair follicles, improve blood supply to the scalp, and support healthier hair growth cycles. This encourages natural regrowth rather than relying on artificial solutions.

The treatment involves a simple process where PRP is carefully injected into targeted areas of the scalp. Because it uses your body’s own biological material, it is a natural approach with minimal risk.

Each treatment is tailored to your specific hair concerns—whether you’re dealing with thinning, early hair loss, or shedding. Results develop gradually and are designed to look natural, blending seamlessly with your existing hair.

What Does Hair Restoration Treat

This treatment is ideal for improving hair density and overall scalp health.

  • Thinning hair
  • Early-stage hair loss
  • Receding hairline
  • Excessive shedding
  • Weak or brittle hair
  • Reduced hair density

Aftercare

There is little to no downtime after treatment, and most clients return to normal activities the same day. Mild tenderness or sensitivity on the scalp may occur temporarily.

  • Avoid washing your hair for 24 hours
  • Avoid strenuous activity for the first day
  • Do not use harsh hair products immediately after
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions
  • Stay consistent with recommended treatment sessions

Hair growth takes time, so results typically begin to appear over several weeks to months. A series of treatments is usually recommended, with results improving and maintaining over time.

How Much Does Hair Restoration Cost

Pricing varies depending on the number of sessions needed and the extent of hair loss being treated. Because each plan is customized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right approach and exact pricing for your goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Advanced hair restoration treatments to combat thinning and stimulate natural hair growth for fuller, healthier hair.

item.title: IV Therapy
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
IV Therapy delivers vitamins, minerals, and hydration directly into your bloodstream for fast, effective results. It’s designed to support energy, recovery, immunity, and overall wellness from the inside out.

Clients choose IV Therapy for its quick absorption and noticeable benefits. At Livia Med Spa, each drip is customized to your needs, ensuring a targeted approach that helps you feel refreshed, balanced, and restored.

What Is IV Therapy

IV Therapy is a wellness treatment that infuses fluids, vitamins, and nutrients directly into the bloodstream through an intravenous line. Because it bypasses the digestive system, your body can absorb these nutrients more efficiently.

Each IV blend is formulated to support specific goals—whether that’s boosting energy, improving hydration, strengthening the immune system, or aiding recovery. Common ingredients may include vitamin C, B vitamins, electrolytes, and other essential nutrients.

The treatment is performed in a comfortable setting and typically takes around 30–60 minutes. Many clients use IV Therapy as part of their routine to maintain wellness or recover quickly from stress, travel, or illness.

Every treatment is fully customized based on your lifestyle and goals. When administered by trained professionals, IV Therapy is a safe and effective way to support overall health and performance.

What Does IV Therapy Treat

IV Therapy is designed to support a wide range of wellness and recovery needs.

  • Dehydration
  • Low energy or fatigue
  • Weakened immune system
  • Hangover symptoms
  • Nutrient deficiencies
  • Recovery from illness or travel

Aftercare

There is no downtime after IV Therapy, and most clients feel refreshed shortly after treatment. You can return to normal activities immediately.

  • Stay hydrated to maintain results
  • Continue a balanced diet
  • Avoid alcohol immediately after treatment
  • Follow any personalized recommendations
  • Schedule treatments as needed for maintenance

Many clients feel benefits shortly after their session, with continued improvement over the next day or two. Results can vary depending on your body and the type of drip used.

How Much Does IV Therapy Cost

Pricing depends on the type of IV drip, ingredients used, and level of customization. Because treatments are tailored, costs can vary.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right IV blend and exact pricing for your needs.
item.excerpt:encoded: Boost hydration, energy, and immunity with custom IV vitamin infusions delivered directly to your bloodstream.

item.title: Angie Spicola
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
My name is Angie Spicola, and I am a board-certified Family Nurse Practitioner specializing in Women’s Health and Aesthetics. Born and raised in Tampa, Florida, I began my nursing journey at Hillsborough Community College and later earned my Master’s Degree in Nursing from South University.

Throughout my career, I have worked in women’s urgent care, labor and delivery, and OBGYN offices, giving me a strong foundation in women’s health. I later transitioned into aesthetics with a passion for helping women feel confident and empowered.

At Livia Med Spa, I combine my medical background and aesthetic expertise to provide safe, personalized treatments that help every client look and feel their best.

item.title: Lori Loscalzo
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded: Lori is a licensed aesthetician and the owner of Amor Esthetics, offering customized skincare treatments focused on improving skin health, boosting confidence, and delivering long-term results. She is passionate about helping clients achieve healthy, glowing skin through personalized care and professional treatments tailored to each individual’s needs. Lori proudly serves clients in the Tampa area and performs each service inside a private treatment room at Livia Med Spa, creating a calm, relaxing, and professional environment where clients can feel comfortable and cared for during every visit.

item.title: Dr. Micah Craig
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Dr. Craig, our Medical Director, began his journey into medicine at age five, walking hospital corridors beside his father, a devoted physician. Those early experiences sparked a lifelong passion for healing. During school and pre-med, he joined medical mission trips across Africa and Central America, shaping his commitment to compassionate, service-driven care.

After earning his undergraduate degree, he worked in public health and later completed a Master’s in Biochemistry before attending medical school. During his Internal Medicine residency in Denver, he served on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic, which ultimately led him to pursue regenerative medicine, longevity science, and aesthetic therapies—focusing on helping patients achieve lasting health, confidence, and quality of life.

item.title: Dermal Fillers
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Dermal fillers are injectable treatments designed to restore volume, enhance facial contours, and smooth lines. They help create a more youthful, balanced appearance while maintaining natural facial movement.

Clients choose dermal fillers for their immediate results and subtle enhancement. At Livia Med Spa, every treatment is carefully customized to your facial structure, ensuring refined, natural-looking results that enhance—not change—your features.

What Are Dermal Fillers

Dermal fillers are gel-like substances, most commonly made of hyaluronic acid, that are injected beneath the skin to restore lost volume and improve facial contours. Hyaluronic acid is naturally found in the body and helps keep skin hydrated and plump.

As we age, volume loss and decreased collagen can lead to sagging, hollow areas, and deeper lines. Fillers work by replenishing this lost volume, smoothing the skin and enhancing structure.

The treatment involves precise injections placed in targeted areas of the face. The amount and placement are fully customized based on your goals, whether you're looking for subtle enhancement or more defined contouring.

Results are visible immediately and designed to look soft and natural. When performed by trained professionals, dermal fillers are a safe and effective way to achieve balanced, long-lasting facial rejuvenation.

What Do Dermal Fillers Treat

Dermal fillers are used to enhance and restore various areas of the face.

  • Loss of facial volume
  • Nasolabial folds (smile lines)
  • Marionette lines
  • Lip enhancement and definition
  • Cheek contour and lift
  • Under-eye hollows

Aftercare

There is minimal downtime after treatment, though mild swelling, redness, or bruising may occur temporarily.

  • Avoid touching or massaging treated areas
  • Avoid intense exercise for 24 hours
  • Apply cold compress if needed
  • Avoid alcohol immediately after
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Results are visible immediately, with final results settling over the next few days. Depending on the type of filler used, results can last anywhere from 6 months to over a year.

How Much Do Dermal Fillers Cost

Pricing depends on the type of filler used, the amount needed, and the areas treated. Because every treatment is customized, costs can vary.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right approach and exact pricing for your goals.

It's no surprise that Livia Med Spa has become a trusted name for dermal filler in Tampa — where artistry meets medical expertise.
How long do dermal fillers last?

Dermal fillers typically last between 6 to 18 months, depending on the type of filler used and the area treated. Lip fillers tend to metabolize faster, while cheek or jawline fillers often last longer.

Yes, when performed by trained professionals, dermal fillers are very safe. At Livia Med Spa in Tampa, our injectors follow precise, anatomy-based protocols using FDA-approved products to ensure both safety and natural results.
Will I look unnatural after getting fillers?
Not at all. Our goal is always a natural, refreshed appearance. We tailor each dermal filler treatment to your unique facial structure and aesthetic goals to avoid the overdone or “frozen” look.

Dermal fillers have become one of the most popular and effective non-surgical treatments to combat visible signs of aging, restore facial volume, and enhance your natural features. At Livia Med Spa in Tampa, we specialize in delivering customized dermal filler treatments tailored to each client’s unique facial structure and aesthetic goals.

If you’re looking for a safe, minimally invasive way to smooth wrinkles, plump lips, or restore youthful contours, our expert injectors use only FDA-approved dermal fillers to provide natural-looking results with minimal downtime. Whether it’s your first time or you want to maintain and enhance previous treatments, we’re here to help you achieve a refreshed and radiant appearance.

Clients in Tampa choose dermal fillers to address a wide range of concerns, including:

  • Lip enhancement: Achieve fuller, plumper, and more defined lips with precise lip augmentation treatments tailored to your desired look.

  • Nasolabial folds (smile lines): Smooth deep folds that run from the nose to the corners of the mouth, softening your facial expression and restoring youthfulness.

  • Cheek volume loss: Restore lifted, youthful contours to the cheeks that often flatten with age, giving your face a healthy, vibrant appearance.

  • Marionette lines: Reduce the downward lines near the mouth that can create a tired or sad expression.

  • Under-eye hollows (tear troughs): Correct dark circles and hollowing beneath the eyes, brightening your gaze and reducing signs of fatigue.

  • Jawline contouring and chin augmentation: Define the jawline and balance facial proportions for a sharper, more sculpted profile.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles: Soften wrinkles around the mouth, nose, and other areas for smoother skin texture.

Dermal fillers are suitable for nearly all skin types and tones, making them an excellent choice for anyone seeking to maintain or rejuvenate their natural beauty without surgery or extensive downtime.

Hair restoration treatments at Livia Med Spa start at $700 for targeting a single area of the face. Specialized treatment for areas like the jawline is priced at $1,400. For more comprehensive treatment covering the entire scalp and hairline, packages can range up to $3,500.

We also offer exclusive member discounts for clients enrolled in our loyalty program, helping you save on your hair restoration journey.

During your consultation, we’ll evaluate your needs and recommend a personalized treatment plan tailored to your goals and budget.

One of the biggest advantages of dermal fillers is the minimal downtime required. While many clients return to their daily routine immediately, it’s common to experience:

  • Mild swelling, redness, or tenderness around injection sites lasting 24 to 48 hours

  • Minor bruising that typically resolves within a week

  • Slight firmness or lumpiness which usually smooths out within days

Most patients see immediate volume and contour improvements, with final results settling over 1 to 2 weeks as any swelling dissipates.

The effects of dermal fillers generally last from 6 to 18 months, depending on the type of filler and treatment area. To maintain your rejuvenated look, we recommend periodic touch-up sessions.

We provide personalized aftercare instructions to help you protect your investment, including:

At Livia Med Spa, we bring a personalized, results-driven approach to every hair restoration treatment we offer. Our Tampa-based team combines medical expertise with advanced technology, ensuring your care is both safe and effective.

What sets us apart:

Whether you’re dealing with hair thinning, postpartum hair loss, or early male pattern baldness, our goal is to help you see real results without pain, downtime, or surgery.

item.title: Botox
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Botox is a trusted injectable treatment designed to smooth fine lines and wrinkles caused by facial movement. It helps create a more refreshed, youthful appearance while still allowing natural expression.

Clients choose Botox for its reliable results and minimal downtime. At Livia Med Spa, every treatment is customized to your facial structure and goals, focusing on soft, natural-looking results that never appear frozen or overdone.

What Is Botox

Botox is a neuromodulator that works by temporarily relaxing the muscles responsible for dynamic wrinkles. These are the lines that form from repeated expressions like frowning, squinting, or raising your eyebrows.

By reducing muscle activity in targeted areas, the skin above becomes smoother and more relaxed. Over time, this can also help prevent deeper wrinkles from forming.

The treatment involves small, precise injections placed in specific muscles. The amount and placement are carefully adjusted based on your facial anatomy and desired outcome, making every treatment fully customized.

Results are designed to enhance your natural appearance, not change it. When performed by trained professionals, Botox is a safe and effective way to maintain a refreshed, youthful look.

What Does Botox Treat

Botox is used to improve common expression-related lines and wrinkles.

  • Forehead lines
  • Frown lines (between the eyebrows)
  • Crow’s feet (around the eyes)
  • Fine lines caused by facial movement
  • Preventative treatment for early wrinkles

Aftercare

There is little to no downtime after treatment, and most clients return to normal activities immediately. Mild redness or swelling at the injection sites may occur briefly.

  • Avoid touching or rubbing the treated areas
  • Stay upright for several hours after treatment
  • Avoid intense exercise for 24 hours
  • Avoid alcohol immediately after
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Results typically begin to appear within a few days, with full results in about 1–2 weeks. Effects usually last around 3–4 months before maintenance treatments are needed.

How Much Does Botox Cost

Pricing is based on the number of units used and the areas treated. Because every face is different, costs can vary.

A consultation is the best way to determine the exact number of units needed and create a personalized treatment plan.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Botox in Tampa Smooth, Natural Results

If you’re looking for a non-surgical way to refresh your appearance, Botox is one of the most trusted and effective treatments available. At Livia Med Spa in Tampa, we specialize in Botox injections that reduce the appearance of wrinkles, soften expression lines, and prevent deeper creases from forming—all while maintaining a natural, relaxed look.

Our licensed injectors combine medical precision with aesthetic artistry to deliver balanced, subtle results. Whether it’s your first time trying Botox or you're returning for maintenance, we’ll create a customized treatment plan that complements your facial features and long-term goals.

Our Tampa clients consistently see a noticeable transformation with Botox. Lines become softer, features appear more lifted, and the face takes on a smoother, more relaxed look. Best of all, the results are natural—never frozen or artificial.

We encourage clients to take progress photos at each session to track results and refine future treatments. Botox can also be paired with dermal fillers, PRP, or skin treatments to address deeper wrinkles or volume loss as part of a full facial rejuvenation plan.

At Livia Med Spa, we treat a wide range of Botox areas with a focus on facial harmony and subtle enhancement. Our most commonly requested zones include forehead lines, glabellar lines (the “11s” between the brows), crow’s feet around the eyes, bunny lines on the nose, lip flips for a fuller upper lip, chin dimpling, and jawline slimming through masseter muscle reduction. Each Botox session at our Tampa location begins with a personalized facial assessment, where we evaluate your muscle movement and take the time to understand your aesthetic goals. This allows us to tailor a precise and natural-looking treatment plan that enhances your unique features.
Discover expert Botox treatments in Tampa at Livia Med Spa. Smooth fine lines, soften wrinkles, and achieve natural results.

Botox is an FDA-approved injectable treatment widely used for reducing the appearance of dynamic facial wrinkles. It contains a purified form of botulinum toxin that works by temporarily relaxing the muscles responsible for repetitive facial movements—such as frowning, squinting, raising your eyebrows, or smiling. These repeated movements cause lines and wrinkles to form over time, and Botox interrupts this process by softening the underlying muscle activity.

When injected into specific, carefully chosen areas, Botox prevents the muscles from contracting too strongly, allowing the skin above them to relax and smooth out naturally. This leads to a noticeable reduction in expression lines, giving you a refreshed, more youthful appearance without the need for surgery or invasive procedures.

A common misconception is that Botox “freezes” your face or leaves you with an unnatural, stiff look. In reality, when administered by a skilled and experienced injector, Botox subtly reduces muscle movement while preserving your natural facial expressions. This ensures your features remain dynamic and expressive, just softer and smoother.

The treatment is fast, generally lasting about 20 to 30 minutes, with minimal discomfort and no downtime. Botox is fully customizable depending on the treatment area, your muscle strength, and your personal aesthetic goals. Whether you want to soften deep wrinkles or prevent new lines from forming, Botox offers a safe and effective solution tailored to your needs.

Botox is most commonly used to treat dynamic wrinkles—those formed by repeated muscle movements over time. At our Tampa med spa, we use Botox to address:

  • Forehead lines

  • Frown lines (often called "11s" between the eyebrows)

  • Crow’s feet around the outer eyes

  • Bunny lines across the bridge of the nose

  • Fine lines around the lips or "smoker’s lines"

  • Dimpling or puckering of the chin (orange peel texture)

  • Vertical neck bands (platysmal bands)

Botox is also frequently used preventatively, especially among younger clients seeking to delay the formation of deep-set wrinkles. This approach, sometimes called "Baby Botox," uses smaller doses to subtly relax the muscles before lines become more prominent.

Botox is an FDA-approved injectable treatment widely used for reducing the appearance of dynamic facial wrinkles. It contains a purified form of botulinum toxin that works by temporarily relaxing the muscles responsible for repetitive facial movements—such as frowning, squinting, raising your eyebrows, or smiling. These repeated movements cause lines and wrinkles to form over time, and Botox interrupts this process by softening the underlying muscle activity.

When injected into specific, carefully chosen areas, Botox prevents the muscles from contracting too strongly, allowing the skin above them to relax and smooth out naturally. This leads to a noticeable reduction in expression lines, giving you a refreshed, more youthful appearance without the need for surgery or invasive procedures.

A common misconception is that Botox “freezes” your face or leaves you with an unnatural, stiff look. In reality, when administered by a skilled and experienced injector, Botox subtly reduces muscle movement while preserving your natural facial expressions. This ensures your features remain dynamic and expressive, just softer and smoother.

The treatment is fast, generally lasting about 20 to 30 minutes, with minimal discomfort and no downtime. Botox is fully customizable depending on the treatment area, your muscle strength, and your personal aesthetic goals. Whether you want to soften deep wrinkles or prevent new lines from forming, Botox offers a safe and effective solution tailored to your needs.

Botox has minimal downtime, making it one of the most convenient cosmetic treatments available. After your session, you may notice mild redness, swelling, or tenderness around the injection sites. These side effects are temporary and usually resolve within a few hours.

For the best results, we recommend:

  • Avoiding intense exercise, alcohol, and lying flat for 4–6 hours

  • Skipping facials, massage, or makeup on the treated area for the rest of the day

  • Lightly moving your facial muscles (smiling, frowning, raising your brows) to help the product settle evenly

You’ll start to see results within 3 to 5 days, with the full smoothing effect visible by 10 to 14 days. Most clients enjoy their results for 3 to 4 months, and with consistent treatments, lines may return more slowly and appear less pronounced over time.

At Livia Med Spa, Botox is never a one-size-fits-all treatment. Every face is different, and we approach each appointment with the care and customization it deserves. Our injectors are highly trained in facial anatomy and specialize in producing results that enhance your appearance without compromising expression or symmetry.

During your consultation, we take the time to assess your facial movement and listen to your aesthetic goals. From there, we craft a personalized injection plan that prioritizes safety, balance, and longevity. Our Tampa med spa is designed to be a welcoming, modern space where clients feel comfortable and supported from consultation to follow-up.

We’re proud to be a trusted provider for Botox in Tampa and surrounding neighborhoods like Carrollwood and Westchase, offering honest guidance and high-level care to every client.

item.title: Butt Lift
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
A non-surgical butt lift enhances shape, volume, and contour without implants or surgery. Using advanced techniques like Sculptra or PRP, this treatment helps create a fuller, more lifted appearance with natural-looking results.

Clients choose this treatment for subtle, balanced enhancement without downtime. At Livia Med Spa, every treatment is customized to your body, focusing on proportion, symmetry, and results that look natural—not overdone.

What Is a Butt Lift

A non-surgical butt lift is designed to improve the shape and fullness of the buttocks without invasive surgery. Instead of implants, it uses biostimulatory injectables like Sculptra or platelet-rich plasma (PRP) to stimulate your body’s natural collagen production.

Over time, this collagen rebuilds volume and improves skin quality, creating a gradual lifting and contouring effect. This means results develop naturally, rather than appearing sudden or artificial.

The treatment is performed through a series of strategic injections placed in targeted areas. These placements are carefully mapped out based on your current shape, desired outcome, and overall proportions. No two treatments are exactly the same.

One of the biggest advantages of this approach is safety and minimal downtime. Because it works with your body’s natural processes, the results feel soft and natural while still providing noticeable improvement. Treatments are performed by trained professionals to ensure precision, balance, and optimal results.

What Does a Butt Lift Treat

This treatment is ideal for improving shape, volume, and overall contour in a subtle, natural way.

  • Loss of volume or flatness
  • Lack of definition or shape
  • Mild sagging or skin laxity
  • Hip dips
  • Uneven contours
  • Desire for fuller, rounder appearance

Aftercare

After treatment, most clients experience minimal downtime and can return to normal activities quickly. Some mild swelling, soreness, or bruising may occur in the treated areas.

  • Avoid intense workouts for 24–48 hours
  • Stay hydrated to support collagen production
  • Avoid pressure on the area immediately after treatment
  • Follow any personalized instructions provided
  • Attend follow-up appointments if recommended

Results begin to develop gradually over several weeks as collagen builds. Full results are typically seen over a few months and can last up to 1–2 years depending on the treatment plan.

How Much Does a Butt Lift Cost

Pricing varies depending on the amount of product used and the level of enhancement desired. Each treatment is fully customized, so costs can differ from patient to patient.

The best way to determine exact pricing is through a consultation, where we assess your goals and create a personalized treatment plan.
item.excerpt:encoded: Non-surgical butt enhancement to lift, firm, and sculpt for a naturally contoured silhouette.

item.title: Vaginal PRP
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Vaginal PRP is a non-surgical treatment designed to support intimate wellness, sensitivity, and overall function using your body’s own natural growth factors. It’s a discreet, effective option for women looking to improve confidence and comfort without downtime.

At Livia Med Spa, this treatment is approached with precision and care. Every treatment is fully customized, focusing on your specific concerns and goals while maintaining a natural, balanced result in a professional and comfortable setting.

What Is Vaginal PRP

Vaginal PRP, often referred to as the “O-Shot,” uses platelet-rich plasma derived from your own blood to stimulate tissue regeneration and improve function. After a small blood draw, the PRP is separated and then carefully injected into targeted areas.

PRP contains concentrated growth factors that help improve blood flow, increase sensitivity, and support collagen production. This process helps rejuvenate the treated area from within, rather than relying on synthetic substances.

The treatment itself is quick and performed with precision to ensure comfort. Because it uses your own biological material, it is considered a natural approach with minimal risk of adverse reactions.

Each treatment is tailored based on your goals—whether that’s improving sensitivity, addressing dryness, or supporting overall intimate wellness. The focus is always on subtle, natural improvements that enhance quality of life.

What Does Vaginal PRP Treat

This treatment is designed to support both functional and confidence-related concerns.

  • Decreased sensitivity
  • Vaginal dryness
  • Mild urinary incontinence
  • Reduced sexual satisfaction
  • Changes after childbirth
  • Age-related changes in tissue quality

Aftercare

There is little to no downtime after Vaginal PRP, and most clients return to normal activities the same day. Mild sensitivity or slight swelling may occur but typically resolves quickly.

  • Avoid sexual activity for 24–48 hours
  • Stay hydrated to support healing
  • Avoid intense exercise for the first day
  • Follow any personalized aftercare instructions
  • Attend follow-up if recommended

Many clients begin noticing improvements within a few weeks, with continued enhancement over time as tissue regenerates. Results can last several months to over a year depending on the individual.

How Much Does Vaginal PRP Cost

Pricing varies based on your specific goals and whether additional treatments are recommended as part of your plan. Because this treatment is highly personalized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine exact pricing and ensure the treatment is right for you.
item.excerpt:encoded: A confidential, non-surgical treatment using platelet-rich plasma to enhance intimate wellness and rejuvenation.

item.title: Penile PRP
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Penile PRP is a non-surgical treatment designed to support performance, sensitivity, and overall function using your body’s natural healing properties. It’s a discreet and effective option for men looking to enhance confidence without medications or invasive procedures.

At Livia Med Spa, treatments are handled with complete professionalism and precision. Every plan is customized to your goals, focusing on natural improvement, comfort, and results that feel balanced—not exaggerated.

What Is Penile PRP

Penile PRP, often referred to as the “P-Shot,” uses platelet-rich plasma (PRP) derived from your own blood to improve blood flow and tissue health. After a simple blood draw, the PRP is processed and then strategically injected into targeted areas.

PRP is rich in growth factors that help stimulate cellular repair, improve circulation, and support stronger, healthier tissue. This can lead to improved function, increased sensitivity, and overall performance enhancement over time.

The procedure is quick and performed with care to ensure comfort throughout the process. Because the treatment uses your own biological material, it is a natural approach with minimal risk of reaction.

Each treatment is fully customized depending on your needs. Whether the goal is improved performance, sensitivity, or confidence, the focus is always on subtle, natural results that develop gradually.

What Does Penile PRP Treat

This treatment is designed to support both performance and overall function.

  • Erectile dysfunction (mild to moderate)
  • Decreased sensitivity
  • Reduced performance
  • Circulation-related concerns
  • Confidence-related concerns
  • Age-related changes in function

Aftercare

There is minimal downtime after treatment, and most clients can return to normal daily activities the same day. Some mild swelling or sensitivity may occur temporarily.

  • Avoid sexual activity for 24–48 hours
  • Stay hydrated to support recovery
  • Avoid intense physical activity for the first day
  • Follow any personalized aftercare instructions
  • Attend follow-up treatments if recommended

Some clients notice improvement within a few weeks, with continued results developing over time. Results can last several months depending on individual response and treatment plan.

How Much Does Penile PRP Cost

Pricing varies depending on your goals and the number of treatments recommended. Because each plan is customized, costs can differ from person to person.

A consultation is the best way to determine exact pricing and build a treatment plan tailored to your needs.
item.excerpt:encoded: A discreet, non-surgical PRP treatment designed to improve intimate health, sensitivity, and confidence.

By softening these muscle movements, the skin above them appears smoother and more relaxed. Over time, this can also help prevent deeper lines from forming.

Results are designed to look natural, allowing you to maintain expression while reducing harsh lines. When performed by trained professionals, Jeuveau is a safe and effective option for maintaining a refreshed appearance.

item.title: Chemical Peels
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Chemical peels are a skin-resurfacing treatment designed to improve tone, texture, and overall clarity. By removing damaged outer layers, they reveal smoother, brighter, and healthier-looking skin underneath.

Clients choose chemical peels for their versatility and noticeable results. At Livia Med Spa, each peel is carefully selected and customized to your skin type and goals, ensuring a balanced, natural-looking outcome.

What Is a Chemical Peel

A chemical peel is a treatment that uses a specialized solution to gently exfoliate the outer layers of the skin. This process encourages cell turnover, allowing new, healthier skin to replace damaged or uneven skin.

Peels can vary in strength—from light refresh treatments to deeper corrective options—depending on your concerns and desired results. This flexibility allows the treatment to be tailored specifically to you.

As the skin renews itself, it becomes smoother, more even in tone, and more radiant. The treatment works not only on the surface but also helps stimulate collagen production over time.

Each peel is chosen based on your skin condition, sensitivity, and goals. When performed by trained professionals, chemical peels are a safe and effective way to improve overall skin quality with natural-looking results.

What Does a Chemical Peel Treat

Chemical peels can address a wide range of skin concerns.

  • Uneven skin tone
  • Hyperpigmentation
  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Acne and acne scars
  • Dull or rough skin
  • Sun damage

Aftercare

Downtime depends on the strength of the peel. You may experience redness, dryness, or peeling as your skin renews.

  • Avoid direct sun exposure and wear SPF daily
  • Keep skin moisturized and hydrated
  • Do not pick or peel the skin
  • Avoid harsh skincare products
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Results begin to show as the skin heals and renews, typically within a few days to a week. With a series of treatments, results can be maintained and improved over time.

How Much Does a Chemical Peel Cost

Pricing varies based on the type and strength of the peel, as well as the number of treatments needed. Because each peel is customized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right peel and exact pricing for your skin.
item.excerpt:encoded: Reveal fresh, radiant skin by removing damaged outer layers with customized chemical peel treatments.

item.title: PRP Facial
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
A PRP Facial uses your body’s own growth factors to improve skin texture, tone, and overall radiance. This treatment helps rejuvenate the skin naturally, creating a smoother, brighter, and more refreshed appearance.

Clients choose PRP facials for their natural approach and gradual, long-lasting results. At Livia Med Spa, every treatment is customized to your skin and goals, ensuring precise application and results that look healthy—not overdone.

What Is a PRP Facial

A PRP Facial, often called a “vampire facial,” combines microneedling with platelet-rich plasma (PRP) derived from your own blood. After a small blood draw, the PRP is processed and then applied or infused into the skin.

PRP is rich in growth factors that help stimulate collagen production, improve skin repair, and enhance overall skin quality. When combined with microneedling, it penetrates deeper into the skin for more effective results.

The treatment works by triggering your body’s natural healing response. As collagen rebuilds, the skin becomes smoother, firmer, and more even in tone.

Each treatment is tailored to your specific concerns, whether you’re targeting fine lines, acne scars, or dull skin. Because it uses your body’s own biological material, it’s a natural option with minimal risk when performed by trained professionals.

What Does a PRP Facial Treat

This treatment helps improve overall skin quality and appearance.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Acne scars
  • Uneven skin tone
  • Dull or tired-looking skin
  • Large pores
  • Skin texture concerns

Aftercare

After treatment, your skin may appear red and feel sensitive for the first 24–48 hours. This is a normal part of the healing process.

  • Avoid sun exposure and wear SPF
  • Do not wear makeup for 24 hours
  • Keep skin clean and hydrated
  • Avoid harsh skincare products
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Initial improvements can be seen within a few weeks, with continued results as collagen builds over time. A series of treatments is often recommended for best results.

How Much Does a PRP Facial Cost

Pricing varies depending on the number of sessions and whether it’s combined with other treatments. Because each facial is customized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right approach and exact pricing for your skin goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Harness your body's own growth factors for natural skin renewal, improved texture, and a radiant glow.

item.title: Cellis Derma PRP
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Cellenis Derma PRP is an advanced regenerative treatment that uses your body’s own growth factors to improve skin quality, texture, and overall appearance. It’s designed to naturally rejuvenate the skin for a smoother, healthier, and more radiant look.

Clients choose this treatment for its ability to deliver noticeable results using a natural approach. At Livia Med Spa, each treatment is customized with precision, focusing on your skin’s needs to create refined, balanced results.

What Is Cellenis Derma PRP

Cellenis Derma PRP is a next-level platelet-rich plasma treatment designed specifically for skin rejuvenation. It uses a specialized system to isolate and concentrate high-quality growth factors from your blood, creating a more refined and consistent PRP solution.

Once prepared, the PRP is applied or injected into targeted areas of the skin, often in combination with microneedling. These growth factors help stimulate collagen production, improve skin repair, and enhance overall skin health.

The treatment works by activating your body’s natural healing response. As new collagen forms, the skin becomes smoother, firmer, and more even in tone.

Each treatment is tailored based on your skin concerns, whether you’re addressing fine lines, dullness, or texture issues. Because it uses your body’s own biological material, it is a natural and well-tolerated option when performed by trained professionals.

What Does Cellenis Derma PRP Treat

This treatment is ideal for improving overall skin quality and rejuvenation.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Uneven skin tone
  • Dull or tired-looking skin
  • Skin texture concerns
  • Mild skin laxity
  • Acne scars

Aftercare

After treatment, you may experience redness, sensitivity, or mild swelling for the first 24–48 hours. This is a normal part of the skin’s healing process.

  • Avoid sun exposure and wear SPF
  • Do not apply makeup for 24 hours
  • Keep skin clean and hydrated
  • Avoid active skincare products for a few days
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Results begin to appear within a few weeks, with continued improvement as collagen builds over time. A series of treatments is often recommended for optimal, long-lasting results.

How Much Does Cellenis Derma PRP Cost

Pricing varies depending on the treatment plan, number of sessions, and combination with other services. Because each treatment is customized, costs can differ.

A consultation is the best way to determine exact pricing and create a plan tailored to your skin goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: Advanced PRP therapy combined with cutting-edge Cellis technology for superior skin rejuvenation and healing.

item.title: Laser Treatments
item.dc:creator: aj@spicolaconstruction.com
item.content:encoded:
Laser treatments are advanced, non-invasive procedures designed to improve skin tone, texture, and overall appearance. They target specific concerns with precision, helping you achieve clearer, smoother, and more youthful-looking skin.

Clients choose laser treatments for their versatility and long-term results. At Livia Med Spa, every treatment is customized using the right technology and settings for your skin, ensuring safe, precise, and natural-looking outcomes.

What Are Laser Treatments

Laser treatments use focused light energy to target specific layers of the skin. Depending on the type of laser and settings used, they can resurface the skin, stimulate collagen production, or target pigmentation and redness.

Different lasers are used for different concerns. Some treatments focus on gentle skin refresh and brightening, while others work deeper to correct more advanced issues like wrinkles or scars.

As the skin heals, it becomes smoother, more even in tone, and more refined in texture. Collagen production is also stimulated, helping improve firmness and overall skin quality over time.

Each treatment is fully customized based on your skin type, concerns, and downtime preferences. When performed by trained professionals, laser treatments are a safe and effective way to achieve noticeable, long-lasting improvements.

What Do Laser Treatments Treat

Laser treatments can address a wide range of skin concerns.

  • Fine lines and wrinkles
  • Sun damage and pigmentation
  • Uneven skin tone
  • Acne scars
  • Redness or vascular concerns
  • Skin texture and roughness

Aftercare

Aftercare varies depending on the type of laser used. Some treatments have little to no downtime, while others may involve redness or peeling.

  • Avoid direct sun exposure and wear SPF daily
  • Keep skin clean and moisturized
  • Do not pick or irritate treated areas
  • Avoid harsh skincare products
  • Follow all personalized aftercare instructions

Results may begin to appear within days to weeks, depending on the treatment. Continued improvement occurs over time as the skin heals and collagen rebuilds.

How Much Do Laser Treatments Cost

Pricing depends on the type of laser, treatment area, and number of sessions required. Because treatments are customized, costs can vary.

A consultation is the best way to determine the right laser treatment and exact pricing for your goals.
item.excerpt:encoded: A range of advanced laser therapies for hair removal, skin tightening, pigmentation correction, and more.
